ISessionAuthOption Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ISessionAuthOption type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AdditionalAuthProps
AuthModuleName
Id
Returns the identifier of this authentication option. This identifier must be unique across all available authentication modules and options.
Product
ShowInInterface
ThrowOnFailure
If this flag is set, an exception during an authentication attempt will be thrown also for FixedCredentials and single-sign-on authentications, instead of continuing trying with the next authentication provider.
Top
